visuals.title: Logical to Physical Address Translation Flow
visuals.description: Shows how the CPU generates a logical address [p|d], checks the TLB, falls back to the page table on a miss, and forms the physical address [f|d] to access memory.

diagrams.title: Logical to Physical Address Translation Flow
steps: Check TLB for page number p
TLB Hit? Yes: get frame f from TLB (fast path)
TLB Miss? No: access page table in memory (slow path)
On miss, update TLB with new page-to-frame mapping
Access physical memory at computed address
diagrams.notes: TLB hit ratio is crucial for performance. Physical Address = (Frame Number x Page Size) + Offset.
